pages.title: Custom Software Development Services
pages.metaTitle: Custom Software Development Company | Gemora Tech
pages.metaDescription: Gemora Tech builds scalable custom software, web applications, and digital systems for global startups and enterprises. Get a free quote today.
pages.h1: Custom Software Development Built for Scale
pages.content:
Welcome to Gemora Tech, a premier division of Gemora Global Private Limited. As a leading global software development company, we provide enterprise-class Custom Software Development Services designed to help startups, mid-sized firms, and massive corporations scale efficiency, innovate faster, and maintain a competitive edge.

In today's fast-moving economy, leveraging digital products is no longer optional—it is a critical necessity. At Gemora Tech, we understand the complexities of designing, building, and deploying software. Our dedicated teams work hand-in-hand with clients from the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, Europe, and India to build digital experiences that deliver high conversions, seamless performance, and ultimate security.

Whether you are looking to build a custom SaaS platform, scale an e-commerce brand, engineer AI-driven analytical modules, or hire a dedicated team of engineers, we provide the technical expertise and management capabilities to bring your vision to life.

Why Choose Gemora Tech for custom software development?

Enterprise-Grade Architecture

We build our applications using scalable patterns, modular microservices, and modern frameworks that can support millions of concurrent users without degradation in performance.

Global Technical Expertise

Our engineering pool consists of top 3% talent with certified expertise in full-stack web architectures, mobile application development, and advanced cloud systems.

Agile Delivery & Transparency

We follow strict Scrum methodologies. You receive weekly demos, access to our Jira project tracking, and constant communication via Slack or Microsoft Teams.

Security & Compliance First

All digital products we develop strictly follow industry security protocols including GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS compliance, and advanced multi-level encryption standards.

Our Comprehensive Development Process

We utilize a structured 7-step software development lifecycle (SDLC) that ensures perfect execution from initial concept brainstorm to final deployment. This process eliminates uncertainty, optimizes developer resources, and guarantees timely delivery.

1

Discovery & Strategy

We analyze your business goals, draft initial user personas, study market competitors, and define exact project deliverables.

2

Planning & Scope Specification

We draft functional specifications, select the architecture stack, structure timelines, and define the resource budget.

3

UI/UX Design

Our design team creates responsive layouts, interactive high-fidelity wireframes, and design systems for client review.

4

Development & Coding

We implement clean, document-ready, and unit-tested code. Development is structured into bi-weekly sprints.

5

Rigorous Testing & QA

Our QA specialists run unit tests, functional testing, API load testing, security checks, and cross-browser responsive audits.

6

Deployment & Launch

We configure CI/CD pipelines and deploy to production-ready hosts like AWS, Vercel, Azure, or Google Cloud.

7

Maintenance & Evolution

We offer ongoing post-launch monitoring, security patches, library upgrades, and performance optimization support.

Key Features of Our Custom Software Development Services

  • ✔ Bespoke Application Design: Custom-architected solutions to align perfectly with your unique business workflows.
  • ✔ Enterprise Integrations: Seamless system integrations to enable real-time data sync and unify operations.
  • ✔ Legacy Migration: Engineered to deliver exceptional user experience, performance, and robustness.
  • ✔ API Engineering: Highly documented RESTful/GraphQL endpoints built for scalability and client consumes.

Our Recommended Technology Stack

We utilize only modern, well-supported technologies to build digital solutions. Our developers stay ahead of industry standards to deliver optimal results.

React Next.js Node.js PostgreSQL Python AWS

Business Benefits

Partnering with Gemora Tech (formerly Dexterous Softech) provides significant operational advantages to your organization:

01

100% Custom IP Ownership

02

Tailored Business Logic

03

High Technical Scalability

Featured Project: Global Platform Launch

The Challenge

Our client, a high-growth scale-up, needed a fully reliable, SEO-optimized, and lightning-fast digital architecture to handle an influx of over 100k daily active users while integrating multiple external REST APIs securely.

Our Custom Solution

We designed a headless, server-rendered application powered by Next.js and Tailwind CSS on the frontend, with a Node.js microservice backend and a high-availability PostgreSQL database clustered across regions.

Measurable Business Outcomes:

+140%
User Retention
-50%
Page Load Time
+35%
Conversion Rate

Accelerate Your Project with Gemora Tech

At Gemora Tech, we pride ourselves on being more than just an outsourcing vendor. We are a trusted digital technology partner dedicated to your long-term success. From consulting on solution architecture to staffing dedicated developers or deploying complete products, we deliver quality code, secure systems, and dependable support.

Ready to build your next breakthrough digital product? Get in touch with our solutions specialists today for a free project quote and consulting session.

faqs.question: What is custom software development?
faqs.answer: It is the process of designing, building, and maintaining software tailored to a specific set of users, functions, or organizations.

faqs.question: Why choose Gemora Tech over others?
faqs.answer: We bring 10+ years of experience, a verified pool of engineers, and secure delivery methodologies.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an MVP SaaS?
faqs.answer: A robust Minimum Viable Product (MVP) SaaS usually takes between 8 to 12 weeks of development.

faqs.question: Which cloud provider is best for my startup?
faqs.answer: AWS is generally standard. However, Google Cloud has great developer tools, and Azure is excellent for enterprise setups.

faqs.question: What is serverless?

faqs.question: What is RPA?
faqs.answer: RPA is software technology that makes it easy to build, deploy, and manage software robots that emulate human actions.

faqs.question: Do you integrate with old desktop apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use robotic process adapters to read inputs and execute actions on legacy UI layers.

faqs.question: What coding standards do you follow for Robotic Process Automation (RPA) Systems?
faqs.answer: We enforce strict TypeScript types, clean architecture code structures, modular components, linting configurations, and automated unit test coverage.

faqs.question: How do you handle server hosting and database scalability?
faqs.answer: We deploy client web portals on serverless frameworks like Vercel or Netlify, and scale databases (PostgreSQL/MongoDB) using automated replica nodes on AWS or Azure.

faqs.question: Do you provide custom API development and database integrations?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design high-performance RESTful or GraphQL APIs and integrate with third-party databases, CRM systems, and accounting software.

faqs.question: Who owns the codebase copyright upon completion?
faqs.answer: You own the full copyright. The repository and deployment coordinates are fully transferred upon sign-off.

faqs.question: Do you implement automated SEO optimizations?
faqs.answer: Yes, all web projects are built using Next.js to leverage server-side rendering, dynamic sitemaps, structured breadcrumb schema, and fast Core Web Vitals.

faqs.question: How do you test Robotic Process Automation (RPA) Systems projects before release?
faqs.answer: Our QA team runs unit testing, integration tests, cross-browser compatibility checks, and load test scripts to ensure peak performance.

faqs.question: What is the average timeline to build a custom portal?
faqs.answer: A standard web project takes 6 to 10 weeks. Enterprise-level custom systems require 12 to 20 weeks.

faqs.question: What hosting platforms do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We recommend Vercel for frontends, AWS or DigitalOcean for server layers, and RDS/MongoDB Atlas for cloud databases.

faqs.question: What is Big Data Analytics?
faqs.answer: It is the process of examining large and varied data sets to uncover hidden patterns, market trends, and customer preferences.

faqs.question: Do you set up cloud data lakes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in building AWS S3 lakes and loading structured tables into Snowflake.

faqs.question: How do you train the machine learning models for Big Data Analytics & Streaming Data Pipelines?
faqs.answer: We utilize custom dataset preprocessing, transfer learning, and fine-tuning of pre-trained LLMs or architectures (like TensorFlow/PyTorch) matching your specific industry data parameters.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the privacy of our proprietary training data?
faqs.answer: We isolate data processing inside virtual private cloud (VPC) subnets on AWS or Azure. We sign strict data-privacy NDAs and do not share your proprietary data with public AI endpoints.

faqs.question: What is the typical accuracy rate for Big Data Analytics & Streaming Data Pipelines models?
faqs.answer: Accuracy is highly dependent on dataset quality. We run multiple iterations, validation loops, and data pruning cycles to achieve optimal model performance and reduce bias/hallucination.

faqs.question: Can Big Data Analytics & Streaming Data Pipelines integrate with our existing ERP or database systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we build custom RESTful APIs or GraphQL endpoints to connect the AI models directly into your databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and ERP systems.

faqs.question: What infrastructure or GPU requirements are needed to host Big Data Analytics & Streaming Data Pipelines?
faqs.answer: We optimize models for cost-efficient deployment using CPU/GPU cloud platforms (AWS EC2, Google Cloud AI, Hugging Face). We also set up scaling infrastructure to optimize execution costs.

faqs.question: Do you offer real-time analytics dashboards for Big Data Analytics & Streaming Data Pipelines?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design visual analytics dashboards using React/Next.js frontends and real-time sockets to display predictions, data insights, and model health.

faqs.question: What tools and frameworks do you use for AI development?
faqs.answer: We specialize in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, Hugging Face Transformers, and data platforms like Apache Spark and Snowflake.

faqs.question: Who owns the trained model weights and algorithms?
faqs.answer: You own all trained weights, model files, code integration layers, and proprietary algorithms upon final milestone settlement.

benefits: Scale to petabytes of data storage

faqs.question: How do you train custom ML models?
faqs.answer: We ingest, clean, and annotate your historical business records to train models in PyTorch or TensorFlow.

faqs.question: Can we run ML inference on mobile devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, we optimize model weights using TensorFlow Lite for edge mobile devices.

faqs.question: How do you train the machine learning models for Custom Machine Learning (ML) Solutions?
faqs.answer: We utilize custom dataset preprocessing, transfer learning, and fine-tuning of pre-trained LLMs or architectures (like TensorFlow/PyTorch) matching your specific industry data parameters.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the privacy of our proprietary training data?
faqs.answer: We isolate data processing inside virtual private cloud (VPC) subnets on AWS or Azure. We sign strict data-privacy NDAs and do not share your proprietary data with public AI endpoints.

faqs.question: What is the typical accuracy rate for Custom Machine Learning (ML) Solutions models?
faqs.answer: Accuracy is highly dependent on dataset quality. We run multiple iterations, validation loops, and data pruning cycles to achieve optimal model performance and reduce bias/hallucination.

faqs.question: Can Custom Machine Learning (ML) Solutions integrate with our existing ERP or database systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we build custom RESTful APIs or GraphQL endpoints to connect the AI models directly into your databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and ERP systems.

faqs.question: What infrastructure or GPU requirements are needed to host Custom Machine Learning (ML) Solutions?
faqs.answer: We optimize models for cost-efficient deployment using CPU/GPU cloud platforms (AWS EC2, Google Cloud AI, Hugging Face). We also set up scaling infrastructure to optimize execution costs.

faqs.question: Do you offer real-time analytics dashboards for Custom Machine Learning (ML) Solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design visual analytics dashboards using React/Next.js frontends and real-time sockets to display predictions, data insights, and model health.

faqs.question: What tools and frameworks do you use for AI development?
faqs.answer: We specialize in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, Hugging Face Transformers, and data platforms like Apache Spark and Snowflake.

faqs.question: Who owns the trained model weights and algorithms?
faqs.answer: You own all trained weights, model files, code integration layers, and proprietary algorithms upon final milestone settlement.

faqs.question: What is Voice App Development?
faqs.answer: It is the creation of software that responds to spoken language, processing speech commands into digital actions.

faqs.question: Can you deploy on mobile voice interfaces?
faqs.answer: Yes, we integrate with Apple SiriKit and Google Assistant actions.

faqs.question: Which is better for Voice App Development & Custom Assistant Systems: Native or Cross-Platform?
faqs.answer: It depends on your requirements. Native development (Swift/Kotlin) offers maximum device performance, while cross-platform frameworks (Flutter/React Native) allow single-codebase builds for iOS and Android, saving 40% in cost.

faqs.question: Do you sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) for Voice App Development & Custom Assistant Systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. Code confidentiality is our top priority. We sign standard NDAs before discussing any project wireframes or requirements.

faqs.question: How do you handle offline functionality and local database storage?
faqs.answer: We implement secure offline caching and sync loops using client-side databases like SQLite, Realm, or watermelondb, which sync automatically with the main server when connection is restored.

faqs.question: Do you assist with publishing Voice App Development & Custom Assistant Systems to the app stores?
faqs.answer: Yes, our engineers manage the deployment, asset preparation, meta tags, and submission approvals for Apple App Store and Google Play.

faqs.question: Can you integrate third-party APIs and payment gateways?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We integrate payment processors (Stripe, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay), authentication systems, map services (Google Maps, Mapbox), and custom ERP/CRM REST endpoints.

faqs.question: What security measures do you implement in Voice App Development & Custom Assistant Systems?
faqs.answer: We implement secure token encryption (JWT), biometric logins (FaceID/TouchID), data encryption (AES-256), SSL pinning, and follow OWASP Mobile Security guidelines.

faqs.question: How do you handle push notifications?
faqs.answer: We configure rich push notifications (text, images, deep links) using Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) or Apple Push Notification Service (APNS).

faqs.question: Who owns the code copyright after deployment?
faqs.answer: You own 100% of the copyright and code assets. The entire intellectual property is handed over upon project sign-off.

benefits: Integrates with smart devices and IoT

faqs.question: How do users trigger my Google Action?
faqs.answer: Users can invoke it by saying "Ok Google, talk to [Your Brand Name]".

faqs.question: Do Google Actions require server hosting?
faqs.answer: We typically host conversational logic using serverless Firebase Cloud Functions for maximum speed.

faqs.question: What coding standards do you follow for Google Assistant Actions & Conversational Voice Bots?
faqs.answer: We enforce strict TypeScript types, clean architecture code structures, modular components, linting configurations, and automated unit test coverage.

faqs.question: How do you handle server hosting and database scalability?
faqs.answer: We deploy client web portals on serverless frameworks like Vercel or Netlify, and scale databases (PostgreSQL/MongoDB) using automated replica nodes on AWS or Azure.

faqs.question: What is the Metaverse?
faqs.answer: The Metaverse is a collective, virtual shared space created by converging physical reality and digital worlds.

faqs.question: Do you need a VR headset to access it?
faqs.answer: No, we build cross-platform WebGL environments accessible via standard desktop and mobile browsers.

faqs.question: What game engines do you use for Next-Gen Metaverse Platform Development Services?
faqs.answer: We primarily utilize Unity 3D, Unreal Engine, and HTML5 frameworks (like Phaser or Three.js) for Next-Gen Metaverse Platform Development Services projects, selecting the engine based on your target platforms, graphics requirements, and budget.

faqs.question: Can you assist with game graphics and UI/UX design?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes dedicated 2D/3D game artists, animation specialists, and UI/UX designers who craft custom characters, game assets, backgrounds, and animations tailored for Next-Gen Metaverse Platform Development Services.

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?
faqs.answer: Upon full milestone clearance, you own 100% of the source code, game assets, visual designs, and intellectual property. We sign a strict NDA before any development work begins.

faqs.question: Do you integrate multiplayer servers and lobby systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We build multiplayer scaling lobbies, matchmakers, real-time chats, and tournament systems using robust socket engines (Socket.io, Photon, or custom WebSockets) backed by scalable AWS hosting.

faqs.question: How do you secure Next-Gen Metaverse Platform Development Services against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

faqs.question: How do you handle multiplayer lag?
faqs.answer: We build dedicated game servers with server reconciliation algorithms to maintain smooth multiplayer state syncs.

faqs.question: Can players own in-game items?
faqs.answer: Yes, we integrate blockchain smart contracts so in-game items can be traded as NFTs.

faqs.question: What game engines do you use for Immersive Metaverse Game Development Studio?
faqs.answer: We primarily utilize Unity 3D, Unreal Engine, and HTML5 frameworks (like Phaser or Three.js) for Immersive Metaverse Game Development Studio projects, selecting the engine based on your target platforms, graphics requirements, and budget.

faqs.question: Can you assist with game graphics and UI/UX design?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes dedicated 2D/3D game artists, animation specialists, and UI/UX designers who craft custom characters, game assets, backgrounds, and animations tailored for Immersive Metaverse Game Development Studio.

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?
faqs.answer: Upon full milestone clearance, you own 100% of the source code, game assets, visual designs, and intellectual property. We sign a strict NDA before any development work begins.

faqs.question: Do you integrate multiplayer servers and lobby systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We build multiplayer scaling lobbies, matchmakers, real-time chats, and tournament systems using robust socket engines (Socket.io, Photon, or custom WebSockets) backed by scalable AWS hosting.

faqs.question: How do you secure Immersive Metaverse Game Development Studio against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

Welcome to Gemora Tech, a premier division of Gemora Global Private Limited. As a leading global software development company, we provide enterprise-class Web3 Game Development Services designed to help startups, mid-sized firms, and massive corporations scale efficiency, innovate faster, and maintain a competitive edge.

In today's fast-moving economy, leveraging digital products is no longer optional—it is a critical necessity. At Gemora Tech, we understand the complexities of designing, building, and deploying software. Our dedicated teams work hand-in-hand with clients from the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, Europe, and India to build digital experiences that deliver high conversions, seamless performance, and ultimate security.

Whether you are looking to build a custom SaaS platform, scale an e-commerce brand, engineer AI-driven analytical modules, or hire a dedicated team of engineers, we provide the technical expertise and management capabilities to bring your vision to life.

Why Choose Gemora Tech for web3 game development?

Enterprise-Grade Architecture

We build our applications using scalable patterns, modular microservices, and modern frameworks that can support millions of concurrent users without degradation in performance.

Global Technical Expertise

Our engineering pool consists of top 3% talent with certified expertise in full-stack web architectures, mobile application development, and advanced cloud systems.

Agile Delivery & Transparency

We follow strict Scrum methodologies. You receive weekly demos, access to our Jira project tracking, and constant communication via Slack or Microsoft Teams.

Security & Compliance First

All digital products we develop strictly follow industry security protocols including GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS compliance, and advanced multi-level encryption standards.

Our Comprehensive Development Process

We utilize a structured 7-step software development lifecycle (SDLC) that ensures perfect execution from initial concept brainstorm to final deployment. This process eliminates uncertainty, optimizes developer resources, and guarantees timely delivery.

1

Discovery & Strategy

We analyze your business goals, draft initial user personas, study market competitors, and define exact project deliverables.

2

Planning & Scope Specification

We draft functional specifications, select the architecture stack, structure timelines, and define the resource budget.

3

UI/UX Design

Our design team creates responsive layouts, interactive high-fidelity wireframes, and design systems for client review.

4

Development & Coding

We implement clean, document-ready, and unit-tested code. Development is structured into bi-weekly sprints.

5

Rigorous Testing & QA

Our QA specialists run unit tests, functional testing, API load testing, security checks, and cross-browser responsive audits.

6

Deployment & Launch

We configure CI/CD pipelines and deploy to production-ready hosts like AWS, Vercel, Azure, or Google Cloud.

7

Maintenance & Evolution

We offer ongoing post-launch monitoring, security patches, library upgrades, and performance optimization support.

Key Features of Our Web3 Game Development Services

  • ✔ Smart Contract Game Logic: Immersive interactive mechanics matching high frame rate outputs and low latency loops.
  • ✔ Decentralized NFT Asset Mints: Engineered to deliver exceptional user experience, performance, and robustness.
  • ✔ Play-to-Earn (P2E) Economy Designs: Beautiful, responsive UI layout that scales perfectly across devices and screen sizes.
  • ✔ Web3 Wallet Integrations: Seamless system integrations to enable real-time data sync and unify operations.

Our Recommended Technology Stack

We utilize only modern, well-supported technologies to build digital solutions. Our developers stay ahead of industry standards to deliver optimal results.

Solidity Unity WebGL Ethers.js Node.js Hardhat

Business Benefits

Partnering with Gemora Tech (formerly Dexterous Softech) provides significant operational advantages to your organization:

01

Enable player ownership of assets

02

Generate royalty fees on secondary sales

03

Completely transparent drop rates

Featured Project: Global Platform Launch

The Challenge

Our client, a high-growth scale-up, needed a fully reliable, SEO-optimized, and lightning-fast digital architecture to handle an influx of over 100k daily active users while integrating multiple external REST APIs securely.

Our Custom Solution

We designed a headless, server-rendered application powered by Next.js and Tailwind CSS on the frontend, with a Node.js microservice backend and a high-availability PostgreSQL database clustered across regions.

Measurable Business Outcomes:

+140%
User Retention
-50%
Page Load Time
+35%
Conversion Rate

Accelerate Your Project with Gemora Tech

At Gemora Tech, we pride ourselves on being more than just an outsourcing vendor. We are a trusted digital technology partner dedicated to your long-term success. From consulting on solution architecture to staffing dedicated developers or deploying complete products, we deliver quality code, secure systems, and dependable support.

Ready to build your next breakthrough digital product? Get in touch with our solutions specialists today for a free project quote and consulting session.

faqs.question: What makes a game a Web3 game?
faqs.answer: Web3 games integrate blockchain technology to enable decentralized asset ownership, player governance, and secure in-game transactions.

faqs.question: Which blockchains do you support?
faqs.answer: We primarily build on Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Avalanche, and BSC.

faqs.question: What game engines do you use for Web3 Game Development & Token Economies?
faqs.answer: We primarily utilize Unity 3D, Unreal Engine, and HTML5 frameworks (like Phaser or Three.js) for Web3 Game Development & Token Economies projects, selecting the engine based on your target platforms, graphics requirements, and budget.

faqs.question: Can you assist with game graphics and UI/UX design?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes dedicated 2D/3D game artists, animation specialists, and UI/UX designers who craft custom characters, game assets, backgrounds, and animations tailored for Web3 Game Development & Token Economies.

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?
faqs.answer: Upon full milestone clearance, you own 100% of the source code, game assets, visual designs, and intellectual property. We sign a strict NDA before any development work begins.

faqs.question: Do you integrate multiplayer servers and lobby systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We build multiplayer scaling lobbies, matchmakers, real-time chats, and tournament systems using robust socket engines (Socket.io, Photon, or custom WebSockets) backed by scalable AWS hosting.

faqs.question: How do you secure Web3 Game Development & Token Economies against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

benefits: Generate royalty fees on secondary sales

faqs.question: What is procedural generation?
faqs.answer: It is the algorithmic creation of game levels, textures, or items dynamically, rather than designing them manually.

faqs.question: Can we build conversational NPCs?

faqs.question: What game engines do you use for AI Game Development & Intelligent NPC Systems?

faqs.question: Can you assist with game graphics and UI/UX design?

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?

faqs.question: How do you secure AI Game Development & Intelligent NPC Systems against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?
faqs.answer: Upon full milestone clearance, you own 100% of the source code, game assets, visual designs, and intellectual property. We sign a strict NDA before any development work begins.

faqs.question: Do you integrate multiplayer servers and lobby systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We build multiplayer scaling lobbies, matchmakers, real-time chats, and tournament systems using robust socket engines (Socket.io, Photon, or custom WebSockets) backed by scalable AWS hosting.

faqs.question: How do you secure Unreal Engine 5 Game Development Services against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

faqs.question: How do you ensure fair card shuffling?
faqs.answer: We implement certified Random Number Generator (RNG) algorithms utilizing cryptographically secure pseudorandom number generators (CSPRNG).

faqs.question: Do you support multiplayer chat?
faqs.answer: Yes, we integrate real-time text and emoji chat modules using Socket.io room streams.

faqs.question: What game engines do you use for Multiplayer Poker Game Development & RNG Systems?
faqs.answer: We primarily utilize Unity 3D, Unreal Engine, and HTML5 frameworks (like Phaser or Three.js) for Multiplayer Poker Game Development & RNG Systems projects, selecting the engine based on your target platforms, graphics requirements, and budget.

faqs.question: Can you assist with game graphics and UI/UX design?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes dedicated 2D/3D game artists, animation specialists, and UI/UX designers who craft custom characters, game assets, backgrounds, and animations tailored for Multiplayer Poker Game Development & RNG Systems.

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?
faqs.answer: Upon full milestone clearance, you own 100% of the source code, game assets, visual designs, and intellectual property. We sign a strict NDA before any development work begins.

faqs.question: Do you integrate multiplayer servers and lobby systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We build multiplayer scaling lobbies, matchmakers, real-time chats, and tournament systems using robust socket engines (Socket.io, Photon, or custom WebSockets) backed by scalable AWS hosting.

faqs.question: How do you secure Multiplayer Poker Game Development & RNG Systems against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

faqs.question: What is the difference between European and American Roulette?
faqs.answer: European Roulette has one zero (2.7% house edge), while American Roulette has a zero and a double zero (5.26% house edge).

faqs.question: How do you simulate the wheel ball?
faqs.answer: We use rotation vectors and decelerating angles to make the ball bounce realistically into pocket slots.

faqs.question: What game engines do you use for Roulette Game Development & Betting Systems?
faqs.answer: We primarily utilize Unity 3D, Unreal Engine, and HTML5 frameworks (like Phaser or Three.js) for Roulette Game Development & Betting Systems projects, selecting the engine based on your target platforms, graphics requirements, and budget.

faqs.question: Can you assist with game graphics and UI/UX design?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes dedicated 2D/3D game artists, animation specialists, and UI/UX designers who craft custom characters, game assets, backgrounds, and animations tailored for Roulette Game Development & Betting Systems.

faqs.question: Who owns the source code and intellectual property of the game?
faqs.answer: Upon full milestone clearance, you own 100% of the source code, game assets, visual designs, and intellectual property. We sign a strict NDA before any development work begins.

faqs.question: Do you integrate multiplayer servers and lobby systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We build multiplayer scaling lobbies, matchmakers, real-time chats, and tournament systems using robust socket engines (Socket.io, Photon, or custom WebSockets) backed by scalable AWS hosting.

faqs.question: How do you secure Roulette Game Development & Betting Systems against anti-cheat and hacking attempts?
faqs.answer: We implement server-side validation for all game moves, secure SSL databases, token-based session handlers, and integrate industry-standard anti-cheat middleware protection.

faqs.question: What monetization models can we implement in the game?
faqs.answer: We support integrations for in-app purchases (IAP), virtual token economies, in-game advertisements (AdMob, Unity Ads), subscription packages, and Web3/NFT token integrations.

faqs.question: Do you handle the App Store and Google Play publishing process?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission, review support, and publication pipeline under your developer credentials, ensuring compliance with Apple App Store and Google Play Guidelines.

faqs.question: Can the game scale to support thousands of concurrent players?
faqs.answer: Yes. By containerizing our server code inside Docker and orchestrating with Kubernetes, we ensure that backend database queries and game servers scale dynamically based on player traffic.

faqs.question: How are games loaded in a multigaming app?
faqs.answer: We use asset bundle downloading so games are fetched dynamically when a user taps them, minimizing initial app size.

faqs.question: Do you integrate local wallets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we connect local bank transfer nodes, cards, and UPI gateways.

faqs.question: What coding standards do you follow for Multigaming Platform Applications (like MPL/Winzo)?
faqs.answer: We enforce strict TypeScript types, clean architecture code structures, modular components, linting configurations, and automated unit test coverage.

faqs.question: How do you handle server hosting and database scalability?
faqs.answer: We deploy client web portals on serverless frameworks like Vercel or Netlify, and scale databases (PostgreSQL/MongoDB) using automated replica nodes on AWS or Azure.

faqs.question: Do you provide custom API development and database integrations?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design high-performance RESTful or GraphQL APIs and integrate with third-party databases, CRM systems, and accounting software.

faqs.question: Who owns the codebase copyright upon completion?
faqs.answer: You own the full copyright. The repository and deployment coordinates are fully transferred upon sign-off.

faqs.question: Do you implement automated SEO optimizations?
faqs.answer: Yes, all web projects are built using Next.js to leverage server-side rendering, dynamic sitemaps, structured breadcrumb schema, and fast Core Web Vitals.

faqs.question: How do you test Multigaming Platform Applications (like MPL/Winzo) projects before release?
faqs.answer: Our QA team runs unit testing, integration tests, cross-browser compatibility checks, and load test scripts to ensure peak performance.

faqs.question: What is the average timeline to build a custom portal?
faqs.answer: A standard web project takes 6 to 10 weeks. Enterprise-level custom systems require 12 to 20 weeks.

faqs.question: What hosting platforms do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We recommend Vercel for frontends, AWS or DigitalOcean for server layers, and RDS/MongoDB Atlas for cloud databases.

pages.metaTitle: Blockchain Development Company | Custom dApp, DeFi & Web3 Solutions
pages.metaDescription: Leading blockchain development company offering 12 core services: custom blockchains, smart contracts, dApps, NFTs, DeFi, crypto wallets, CEX/DEX exchange development, and enterprise Web3 solutions.
pages.content:
What Is a Blockchain Development Company?

A Blockchain Development Company like Gemora Tech designs, builds, deploys, and maintains decentralized applications (dApps) and blockchain-based solutions that improve security, transparency, automation, and trust in digital transactions. Our team covers all 12 core blockchain engineering domains — from custom network architecture to smart contract security audits.

Our 12 Core Blockchain Services

Each service below links to a dedicated page with full technical details, technology stacks, and FAQs:

1. Custom Blockchain Development

  • Private, public, and consortium blockchains
  • Enterprise blockchain solutions
  • Permissioned blockchain networks

2. Smart Contract Development

  • Smart contracts using Solidity, Rust, Move, and Vyper
  • Contract auditing and security testing
  • Automated business workflows

3. Decentralized Application (dApp) Development

  • Web3 applications and DeFi frontends
  • Wallet integration (MetaMask, WalletConnect, RainbowKit)
  • User-friendly blockchain interfaces

4. Cryptocurrency & Token Development

  • ERC-20, BEP-20, ERC-721 (NFT), ERC-1155 tokens
  • Stablecoins (fiat-backed and algorithmic)
  • Governance tokens and DAO tokenomics

5. NFT Development

  • NFT marketplaces with auction and royalty engines
  • NFT minting platforms (gas-optimized ERC-721A)
  • Digital collectibles and Gaming NFTs

6. DeFi (Decentralized Finance) Solutions

  • Decentralized exchanges (DEX) with AMM and liquidity pools
  • Lending & borrowing platforms
  • Yield farming, staking platforms, and auto-compounding vaults

7. Blockchain Consulting

  • Blockchain strategy and technology selection
  • Proof of Concept (PoC) rapid development
  • Scalable architecture planning

8. Crypto Wallet Development

  • Mobile wallets (iOS & Android)
  • Web wallets and browser extension wallets
  • Multi-currency wallets and hardware wallet integration

9. Exchange Development (CEX & DEX)

  • Centralized exchanges (CEX) with ultra-fast matching engines
  • Decentralized exchanges (DEX) and OTC trading platforms
  • P2P exchanges with escrow smart contracts

10. Enterprise Blockchain Solutions

  • Supply chain management and provenance tracking
  • Healthcare, Finance, Insurance, Real estate
  • Decentralized identity management

11. Blockchain Security

  • Smart contract audits (automated + manual review)
  • Penetration testing and attack simulations
  • Security assessments and AML/KYC compliance

12. Web3 Development

  • DAO platforms with on-chain governance
  • Decentralized identity (DID / SSI / Soulbound Tokens)
  • Cross-chain applications and metaverse integrations

Blockchain Networks We Work With

  • Public L1s: Ethereum, Solana, Avalanche, BNB Chain, Polygon
  • L2 Scaling: Arbitrum, Optimism, zkSync, Polygon zkEVM
  • Interoperability: Cosmos, Polkadot, LayerZero, Wormhole
  • Enterprise / Permissioned: Hyperledger Fabric, Besu, Corda

Programming Languages

  • Smart Contracts: Solidity, Rust, Move, Vyper
  • Backend Services: Go, Python, Java, Node.js / TypeScript
  • Frontend: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript

Key Benefits of Working with Gemora Tech

  • Enhanced security through cryptography and independent audits
  • Greater transparency and on-chain traceability
  • Automated processes with battle-tested smart contracts
  • Lower operational costs and faster cross-border settlements
  • 100% IP ownership with legally binding NDA protection

pages.content:
Secure Crypto Wallet Development Services

Cryptocurrency wallets are the gateway to the Web3 economy. Whether you need a non-custodial mobile app for retail users, an enterprise-grade custody platform, or a browser extension for dApp interaction, security and user experience are paramount. Gemora Tech is a leading crypto wallet development company, engineering high-performance wallet solutions with state-of-the-art cryptographic protection and intuitive user interfaces.

Our Wallet Development Solutions

  • Non-Custodial Wallets: We build user-centric wallets where private keys are encrypted and stored locally on the device using Secure Enclave, giving users 100% control of their funds.
  • Multi-Chain & Cross-Chain Support: Our wallets support multiple digital assets across diverse blockchains, including Bitcoin, Ethereum (ERC-20), Solana (SPL), and BSC (BEP-20) under a single mnemonic seed phrase.
  • Biometric & Multi-Signature Security: Integrate multi-factor authentication, biometric logins (Face ID, fingerprint), and multi-signature authorization protocols for high-value transaction approvals.
  • Web3 Browser Extensions: We develop custom browser extensions (similar to MetaMask) that allow users to connect to decentralized applications (dApps) and approve smart contract transactions securely.

Advanced Cryptographic Engineering

We implement industry-standard cryptographic algorithms, including BIP-32 (hierarchical deterministic wallets), BIP-39 (mnemonic seeds), and BIP-44 (multi-account structures). Your wallet app is built to satisfy stringent security compliance standards and undergoes independent penetration testing before deployment.
pages.faqs: [{"question":"What is the difference between custodial and non-custodial wallets?","answer":"Custodial wallets store private keys on a central database, meaning the operator is responsible for key security. Non-custodial wallets encrypt and store private keys locally on the user's device, giving them sole ownership and access to their funds."},{"question":"How do you protect mobile wallets from key theft?","answer":"We utilize the device's hardware-isolated hardware (iOS Secure Enclave, Android Keystore), enforce biometrics, implement screen-recording blocks, prevent running on rooted/jailbroken devices, and use advanced memory obfuscation techniques."},{"question":"Do your wallets support custom tokens?","answer":"Yes. Our wallets are built with custom token addition features, allowing users to import any custom ERC-20, BEP-20, or SPL token by simply pasting its smart contract address."}]

pages.title: Crypto Coin Development Company | Custom Layer 1 & 2 Blockchains | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Crypto Coin Development Company | Custom Layer 1 & 2 Blockchains
pages.metaDescription: Create custom cryptocurrency coins on Layer 1/2 networks or launch independent blockchain mainnets. Expert coin tokenomics and mining/staking setups.
pages.content:
Custom Cryptocurrency Coin Development

Launching a custom cryptocurrency coin allows businesses to power decentralized ecosystems, raise capital, implement loyalty programs, or build independent financial systems. Unlike standard tokens that run on existing networks, creating a 'coin' typically involves launching an independent blockchain mainnet or building a custom Layer 2 fork. Gemora Tech provides full-lifecycle coin development, from initial tokenomics design to mainnet launch and explorer integration.

Our Coin Development Capabilities

  • Mainnet Architecture & Launch: We design custom consensus protocols (Proof of Stake, Delegated Proof of Stake, Proof of Authority) and configure independent node networks to boot your blockchain.
  • Tokenomics & Economic Modeling: Our financial analysts model coin supply caps, inflation/deflation schedules, staking rewards, transaction fee structures, and vesting allocations.
  • Block Explorer & Wallet Setup: We build dedicated block explorers (similar to Etherscan) to allow transparent tracking of transactions, along with custom desktop, mobile, and web wallets for coin distribution.
  • Staking & Mining Pool Integration: Configure staking contracts for network validators or set up mining pools for Proof-of-Work configurations, establishing robust node participant networks.

Enterprise Blockchain Engineering

Building a secure, stable blockchain network requires deep expertise in cryptography, distributed systems, and network protocols. Gemora Tech's blockchain architects ensure your custom coin is resistant to common attack vectors (51% attacks, sybil attacks) and optimized for low transaction latency.
pages.faqs: [{"question":"What is the difference between a coin and a token?","answer":"A coin is native to its own independent blockchain mainnet (e.g., BTC on Bitcoin, ETH on Ethereum). A token is created on top of an existing blockchain using smart contracts (e.g., USDT or LINK on Ethereum)."},{"question":"Which consensus mechanism is best for a business project?","answer":"For most commercial projects, Proof of Stake (PoS) or Proof of Authority (PoA) is preferred over Proof of Work (PoW) due to lower energy consumption, faster transaction throughput, and lower infrastructure operating costs."},{"question":"How long does it take to launch a custom blockchain mainnet?","answer":"Launching a custom mainnet typically takes 3 to 6 months, including node setup, wallet creation, block explorer integration, staking configuration, and security audits."}]

pages.title: Token Development Company | Custom ERC-20, BEP-20 & SPL Tokens | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Token Development Company | Custom ERC-20, BEP-20 & SPL Tokens
pages.metaDescription: Leading token development company. Launch custom utility, governance, security, or asset-backed tokens on Ethereum, BSC, Solana, and Polygon.
pages.content:
Custom Token Development Services

Tokens are the primary units of value, utility, and governance in decentralized ecosystems. From utility tokens for decentralized services to governance tokens for DAOs (Decentralized Autonomous Organizations) and asset-backed security tokens, launching a custom token requires precise smart contract engineering. Gemora Tech is a leading token development company, delivering audited, secure, and gas-optimized token smart contracts across all major blockchain protocols.

Our Token Development Offerings

  • Fungible Tokens (ERC-20, BEP-20, SPL): We develop standard-compliant utility and payment tokens on Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain, Solana, and Polygon, ready for exchange listing.
  • Non-Fungible Tokens (ERC-721, ERC-1155): Build NFT smart contracts for digital art, gaming assets, real estate fractionalization, and tickets, with metadata hosting and marketplace integrations.
  • Governance Tokens & DAO Setup: Launch tokens with voting weights, proposal submission rules, and delegation features, integrated with governance portals like Snapshot.
  • Token Vesting & Liquidity Contracts: Create vesting smart contracts that release developer and investor tokens on a defined schedule, preventing price dumps at launch.

Gas-Optimized Smart Contracts

High gas fees can kill user adoption. Our Solidity and Rust engineers prioritize gas optimization during contract design, utilizing modern patterns (like ERC-721A or custom loop optimizations) to minimize transaction costs for your users.
pages.faqs: [{"question":"What blockchain networks support token creation?","answer":"We support token creation on all EVM-compatible networks (Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Avalanche) and non-EVM networks like Solana, selecting the chain based on your target transaction speed and cost expectations."},{"question":"Do you help with token listing on exchanges?","answer":"We prepare your token for listing by ensuring full compliance with exchange technical standards, providing audited smart contract source code, and helping configure initial liquidity pools on decentralized exchanges (DEXs) like Uniswap or PancakeSwap."},{"question":"What is token vesting?","answer":"Token vesting locks up a portion of the token supply (e.g., developer or early investor shares) and releases it gradually over time using a smart contract, preventing large dumps that could devalue the token at launch."}]

pages.title: Decentralized Exchange (DEX) Development Company | AMM & DEX Solutions | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Decentralized Exchange (DEX) Development Company | AMM Solutions
pages.metaDescription: Leading Decentralized Exchange (DEX) development company. Build custom AMM platforms, liquidity pools, yield farming, and token swap engines.
pages.content:
Custom DEX & AMM Development Services

Decentralized Exchanges (DEXs) have revolutionized financial markets by allowing users to swap digital assets directly from their wallets, without relying on central intermediaries. A modern DEX must offer low slippage, dynamic fees, high-security smart contracts, and a seamless multi-wallet user experience. Gemora Tech provides end-to-end DEX development services, building platforms modeled on successful architectures (like Uniswap, PancakeSwap, or Raydium) or custom trading mechanisms.

Our DEX Engineering Capabilities

  • Automated Market Maker (AMM): We implement AMM algorithms (Constant Product Formula, concentrated liquidity models) to enable instant token swaps without an order book.
  • Liquidity Pools & Staking: Build smart contracts that allow users to provide liquidity, receive LP tokens, and earn trading fees, promoting network liquidity.
  • Yield Farming & Reward Engines: Integrate yield farming smart contracts that distribute reward tokens to liquidity providers, boosting user engagement and TVL (Total Value Locked).
  • Multi-Wallet Connectors: Implement secure Web3 login systems supporting WalletConnect, MetaMask, RainbowKit, and Coinbase Wallet for a seamless user onboarding flow.

Uncompromising Smart Contract Security

DEX platforms handle millions in user liquidity, making them high-value targets for exploits. Gemora Tech enforces rigorous smart contract auditing, reentrancy guards, multi-sig admin controls, and oracle integrations (like Chainlink) to protect your platform from flash loan attacks and price manipulation.
pages.faqs: [{"question":"How do DEX platforms generate revenue for operators?","answer":"DEX operators earn revenue by charging a small fee (typically 0.1% to 0.3%) on every token swap. A portion of this fee is distributed to liquidity providers, and the rest goes to the platform treasury wallet."},{"question":"What is concentrated liquidity in DEX design?","answer":"Concentrated liquidity (introduced in Uniswap v3) allows liquidity providers to allocate their funds within specific price ranges rather than across the entire curve, maximizing capital efficiency and reducing slippage for traders."},{"question":"How do you protect DEXs from flash loan exploits?","answer":"We use decentralized price oracles (like Chainlink) instead of internal spot price calculations, implement reentrancy guards, validate transaction paths, and conduct rigorous test coverage of arbitrage scenarios."}]

pages.title: Centralized Crypto Exchange Development Company | Custom CEX Platform | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Centralized Crypto Exchange Development Company | Custom CEX Platform
pages.metaDescription: Build secure, high-throughput centralized cryptocurrency exchanges (CEX) with ultra-fast matching engines, hot/cold wallets, and compliance tools.
pages.content:
Centralized Crypto Exchange (CEX) Development

Centralized cryptocurrency exchanges (CEXs) — like Binance, Coinbase, and Kraken — remain the preferred platform for retail and institutional traders due to their ultra-fast matching speeds, high liquidity, fiat integration, and advanced trading features. Building a competitive CEX requires engineering a highly secure, scalable system capable of processing millions of transactions per second with microsecond latency. Gemora Tech provides full-stack CEX development, delivering secure order-matching engines, custodial wallet structures, and admin control panels.

Our CEX Development Modules

  • High-Performance Matching Engine: We build custom matching engines in C++ or Rust that process buy/sell limit and market orders with microsecond latency and clean order book management.
  • Hot & Cold Wallet Architecture: Implement a secure multi-tier storage structure: cold storage (offline multisig vaults) holding 95%+ of assets, and automated hot wallets for processing instant withdrawals.
  • Fiat Integration & KYC/AML Pipeline: Integrate fiat gateways (Stripe, MoonPay, bank transfer APIs) and automate user verification using leading KYC/AML validation providers (Sumsub, Onfido).
  • Advanced Trading Features: We design responsive web frontends with TradingView charting, spot trading panels, derivatives/leverage capabilities, and REST/WebSocket APIs for trading bots.

Robust Security Infrastructures

CEX security is a multi-layered discipline. We implement: hardware-isolated key management, database encryption, anti-DDoS protection, two-factor authentication (2FA), IP whitelisting, and real-time security alerts to protect customer funds and platform reputation.
pages.faqs: [{"question":"How fast is your crypto matching engine?","answer":"Our trading engines are built in C++/Rust and process up to 100,000+ transactions per second (TPS) with single-digit microsecond order execution latency under peak loads."},{"question":"How do you secure CEX user funds?","answer":"We implement a strict multi-tier storage model: 95% of customer assets are stored in offline multi-signature cold vaults. The remaining 5% is kept in secure, dynamically replenished hot wallets with strict rate limits."},{"question":"What compliance standards do CEXs need?","answer":"CEX operators must comply with local AML (Anti-Money Laundering) and KYC (Know Your Customer) regulations, register as a Money Services Business (MSB) where applicable, and implement transaction monitoring filters."}]

pages.title: Custom Blockchain Development Company | Private, Public & Consortium | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Custom Blockchain Development Company | Private, Public & Consortium
pages.metaDescription: Gemora Tech is a leading custom blockchain development company building private, public, consortium, and permissioned blockchain networks for enterprises worldwide.
pages.content:
What Is Custom Blockchain Development?

Custom blockchain development refers to the end-to-end process of designing and building a bespoke, purpose-built distributed ledger system tuned to your exact business logic, performance targets, and governance requirements. Unlike using an off-the-shelf public blockchain where rules are shared, a custom network gives you complete control over consensus mechanisms, transaction throughput, data privacy, and validator governance.

At Gemora Tech, our blockchain architects have delivered custom networks for fintech startups, healthcare consortiums, government agencies, and global supply chain enterprises. Every network we build is security-hardened, independently audited, and production-ready.

Private Blockchain Development

A private blockchain is operated by a single organization. Only pre-approved participants can read, write, or validate transactions, making it ideal for internal enterprise applications where full confidentiality is required.

  • Built on Hyperledger Fabric, Besu, or Corda for enterprise compliance
  • Custom consensus: Raft, PBFT, or proprietary BFT variants
  • Role-based access control (RBAC) for data visibility layers
  • Integration with existing ERP, CRM, and legacy databases via secure APIs

Public Blockchain Development

A public blockchain is decentralized, permissionless, and openly accessible. Anyone can participate as a user, validator, or developer. Gemora Tech helps you launch your own Layer 1 public chain or deploy applications on leading public networks.

  • Custom Layer 1 mainnet launch with custom genesis blocks
  • Native cryptocurrency and tokenomics modeling
  • Proof of Stake (PoS) or Proof of Authority (PoA) consensus
  • Block explorer, public RPC nodes, and developer SDK delivery

Consortium Blockchain Development

A consortium blockchain is governed by a group of organizations — none of which has unilateral control. This model is widely used in trade finance, pharmaceutical supply chains, and insurance claims processing where multiple parties need shared data without full public exposure.

  • Multi-organizational governance and on-chain voting
  • Shared validator node networks across member companies
  • Interoperability bridges connecting consortium chains to public networks
  • Compliance-ready audit trails accessible to regulators

Permissioned Blockchain Networks

Permissioned blockchains restrict who can read data, submit transactions, and run validators. This is the preferred model for regulated industries such as banking and healthcare where GDPR, HIPAA, or PCI-DSS compliance must be maintained.

  • Fine-grained permissioning with channel-level data isolation
  • Encrypted transaction payloads using zero-knowledge proofs (ZKPs)
  • Smart contract lifecycle management with policy enforcement

Our Custom Blockchain Technology Stack

  • Frameworks: Hyperledger Fabric, Hyperledger Besu, Ethereum (Go-Ethereum), Substrate (Polkadot SDK), Cosmos SDK
  • Languages: Go, Rust, Solidity, Java, TypeScript
  • Infrastructure: Kubernetes-managed nodes, AWS/GCP/Azure cloud deployments

Related Blockchain Services

  • Smart Contract Development
  • Decentralized Application (dApp) Development
  • Enterprise Blockchain Solutions
  • Blockchain Security Audits
  • Back to Blockchain Development Overview
pages.faqs: [{"question":"How long does it take to build a custom blockchain network?","answer":"A private or permissioned blockchain network typically takes 3–6 months for production launch, including node setup, smart contract development, security audits, and integration testing. A full public Layer 1 mainnet launch can take 6–12 months."},{"question":"What consensus mechanism is best for a private enterprise blockchain?","answer":"For enterprise private chains, Raft or PBFT (Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance) are commonly preferred over energy-intensive Proof of Work. For semi-public networks, Delegated Proof of Stake (DPoS) offers a good balance of speed and decentralization."},{"question":"Can a custom blockchain integrate with our existing ERP or database?","answer":"Yes. Gemora Tech builds secure middleware and REST/GraphQL APIs that bridge your blockchain network with SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, and other enterprise systems, enabling real-time data synchronization without disrupting existing operations."},{"question":"What is the cost of custom blockchain development?","answer":"A private permissioned network starts around $20,000–$50,000. A full public Layer 1 mainnet with custom consensus, native token, block explorer, and wallet integration ranges from $80,000–$200,000+ depending on complexity."},{"question":"Do you provide ongoing maintenance after the blockchain is launched?","answer":"Yes. We offer SLA-based maintenance contracts covering node monitoring, protocol upgrades, security patches, smart contract updates, and 24/7 emergency support."}]

pages.title: Smart Contract Development Company | Solidity, Rust & Move | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Smart Contract Development Company | Solidity, Rust & Move Experts
pages.metaDescription: Gemora Tech is a leading smart contract development company. We write, audit, and deploy gas-optimized smart contracts on Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, and Polygon.
pages.content:
What Are Smart Contracts?

Smart contracts are self-executing programs stored on a blockchain that automatically enforce the terms of an agreement when predefined conditions are met — without requiring any intermediary, court, or third party. They are the foundational building block of DeFi protocols, NFT platforms, DAOs, token launches, and automated business workflows.

Gemora Tech's certified smart contract engineers write production-grade contracts in Solidity, Rust, Move, and Vyper, backed by rigorous security testing, gas optimization, and formal verification.

Smart Contracts Using Solidity, Rust, Move & More

  • Solidity (EVM Chains): Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain, Avalanche, Arbitrum, Optimism
  • Rust (Solana / NEAR / Polkadot): High-performance contracts with near-zero fees
  • Move (Aptos / Sui): Next-generation resource-oriented contract programming
  • Vyper: Pythonic, auditable contracts for high-security DeFi applications

Contract Auditing & Security Testing

Smart contract bugs are irreversible and can result in catastrophic fund losses. Gemora Tech's security team performs multi-layer audits before every deployment:

  • Automated static analysis using Slither, MythX, and Echidna
  • Manual expert code review by senior cryptography engineers
  • Reentrancy, integer overflow, and flash loan attack simulations
  • Gas cost profiling and loop optimization
  • Full audit reports published on request

Automated Business Workflows via Smart Contracts

Replace costly manual processes with on-chain automation:

  • Token vesting and cliff release schedules for investors and employees
  • Escrow contracts for freelance marketplaces and real estate deals
  • Automated dividend distribution and revenue sharing
  • Multi-signature approval workflows replacing manual authorization
  • Subscription billing and recurring payment automation

Related Services

  • Custom Blockchain Development
  • dApp Development
  • DeFi Protocol Development
  • Blockchain Security & Audit
  • Back to Blockchain Development Overview
pages.faqs: [{"question":"How do you ensure smart contracts are secure before deployment?","answer":"We run a 4-layer security process: (1) automated static analysis tools, (2) manual expert code review, (3) adversarial testing with attack simulations, and (4) gas profiling. We only deploy after a clean audit report is generated."},{"question":"Which blockchain does Gemora Tech write smart contracts for?","answer":"We write smart contracts for all major EVM-compatible chains (Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain, Avalanche) and non-EVM chains including Solana (Rust), Aptos/Sui (Move), and NEAR."},{"question":"Can you audit smart contracts written by another team?","answer":"Yes. We offer independent third-party smart contract audits for contracts written by any team, using our full security testing pipeline and providing a detailed written audit report."},{"question":"What is gas optimization and why does it matter?","answer":"Gas optimization reduces the computation cost of executing your contract, directly lowering transaction fees for your users. We use techniques like variable packing, efficient loop patterns, and proxy architectures to minimize on-chain costs."},{"question":"Can a deployed smart contract be upgraded?","answer":"Standard contracts are immutable once deployed. However, we use upgradeable proxy patterns (OpenZeppelin Transparent Proxy, UUPS Proxy) that allow logic upgrades while preserving contract state and address."}]

pages.title: dApp Development Company | Decentralized Application Development | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: dApp Development Company | Web3 Decentralized App Experts
pages.metaDescription: Leading dApp development company. We build full-stack decentralized applications with React/Next.js frontends, smart contract backends, and seamless Web3 wallet integration.
pages.content:
What Is a Decentralized Application (dApp)?

A decentralized application (dApp) is a software application that runs on a peer-to-peer blockchain network rather than centralized servers. Unlike traditional apps, dApps have no single point of failure, no centralized data storage, and no intermediary controlling user funds or data. They are powered by smart contracts and accessed through standard Web3 browsers and wallets.

Gemora Tech builds full-stack dApps with beautiful, responsive frontends and battle-tested smart contract backends — delivering the best of Web2 UX and Web3 decentralization.

Web3 Application Development

We engineer complete Web3 platforms across all blockchain verticals:

  • DeFi protocols — DEXs, lending platforms, yield farms, staking dashboards
  • NFT platforms — marketplaces, minting sites, gallery and auction portals
  • DAO governance portals with on-chain voting and treasury management
  • Play-to-earn and GameFi platforms with in-game token economies
  • Web3 social platforms with decentralized identity and content ownership

Wallet Integration

Seamless wallet connectivity is essential for user adoption. We integrate all major Web3 wallets using industry-standard connector libraries:

  • MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, Trust Wallet browser extensions
  • WalletConnect v2 for 300+ mobile wallets
  • RainbowKit and Web3Modal for beautiful one-click connect UIs
  • Hardware wallet support (Ledger, Trezor) for institutional users

User-Friendly Blockchain Interfaces

Web3 UX is notorious for being confusing. Gemora Tech designs interfaces that abstract blockchain complexity for everyday users:

  • Clear transaction status indicators and confirmation flows
  • Gas fee estimation and speed selection controls
  • Real-time portfolio dashboards with on-chain data indexing (The Graph)
  • Mobile-responsive designs for seamless dApp usage on all devices

Our dApp Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
  • Web3 Libraries: ethers.js, viem, wagmi, web3.js
  • Indexing: The Graph Protocol, Moralis, Alchemy
  • Smart Contracts: Solidity, Rust, Hardhat, Foundry, Anchor

Related Services

  • Smart Contract Development
  • DeFi Solutions
  • NFT Development
  • Web3 Development
  • Back to Blockchain Overview
pages.faqs: [{"question":"What is the difference between a dApp and a regular app?","answer":"Traditional apps store data and run logic on centralized company servers, meaning the company controls your data. dApps store data and run logic on decentralized blockchain networks — no single entity can alter records or freeze user funds."},{"question":"How long does it take to build a dApp?","answer":"A basic dApp (e.g., a simple staking or NFT minting site) typically takes 4–8 weeks. A complex DeFi protocol or NFT marketplace with advanced features takes 3–6 months, including smart contract audits and UI testing."},{"question":"Which wallets can users use with your dApps?","answer":"Our dApps support MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, WalletConnect (300+ mobile wallets), Rainbow, Trust Wallet, and hardware wallets like Ledger and Trezor via connector libraries."},{"question":"Can you build dApps on mobile?","answer":"Yes. We build mobile-responsive Web3 dApps and also develop native mobile dApps for iOS and Android that integrate with in-app wallet solutions using WalletConnect and EIP-4337 account abstraction."},{"question":"Do dApps work without internet?","answer":"dApps require internet connectivity to communicate with blockchain nodes. However, read-only functions can be served from cached data. We implement fallback RPC endpoints and caching layers to maximize uptime and resilience."}]

pages.title: Cryptocurrency & Token Development Company | ERC-20, NFT, Stablecoin | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: Cryptocurrency & Token Development Company | ERC-20, NFT, Stablecoin Experts
pages.metaDescription: Launch custom ERC-20, BEP-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155 tokens, stablecoins, and governance tokens. Gemora Tech is your trusted cryptocurrency and token development partner.
pages.content:
Custom Cryptocurrency & Token Development

Tokens are the primary units of value, utility, and governance in the Web3 economy. Whether you need a fungible utility token for a SaaS subscription model, a stablecoin for a payment protocol, or a governance token for a DAO, Gemora Tech delivers audited, gas-optimized token smart contracts ready for mainnet deployment and exchange listing.

ERC-20, BEP-20, ERC-721 & ERC-1155 Token Development

  • ERC-20 (Fungible Tokens): The gold standard for utility and payment tokens on Ethereum and EVM chains. Suitable for DeFi, loyalty programs, and fundraising.
  • BEP-20 (BNB Chain): Identical to ERC-20 but optimized for Binance Smart Chain's lower fees and faster block times.
  • ERC-721 (NFTs): Non-fungible tokens representing unique digital assets — art, collectibles, game items, or event tickets.
  • ERC-1155 (Multi-Token Standard): A single contract managing both fungible and non-fungible tokens — ideal for gaming economies with mixed item types.
  • SPL Tokens (Solana): High-throughput token standard on the Solana network with sub-cent transaction fees.

Stablecoin Development

  • Fiat-Backed Stablecoins: 1:1 USD/EUR-collateralized tokens with regulated reserve attestation and compliance tooling.
  • Crypto-Collateralized Stablecoins: Over-collateralized by on-chain assets (like DAI's MakerDAO model).
  • Algorithmic Stablecoins: Supply-adjusting protocols using seigniorage and bonding curves to maintain price pegs.

Governance Token Development

  • Voting weight assignment based on token holdings
  • Proposal submission, discussion, and quorum enforcement on-chain
  • Delegation and vote-locking (ve-token) models
  • Integration with Snapshot for off-chain signaling

Token Vesting & Liquidity Setup

  • Cliff and linear vesting smart contracts for teams, advisors, and investors
  • Liquidity pool seeding on Uniswap, PancakeSwap, and Raydium
  • Tokenomics modeling and supply allocation advisory

Related Services

  • NFT Development
  • DeFi Development
  • Smart Contract Development
  • Back to Blockchain Overview

Our tokenomics team designs supply caps, vesting schedules, inflation/deflation mechanics, staking rewards, and treasury allocation plans to make your token economically sustainable."},{"question":"How do you list tokens on exchanges?","answer":"We prepare exchange-ready token packages including audited smart contract code, documentation, and liquidity bootstrapping. We support CEX listing applications and DEX pool creation on Uniswap, PancakeSwap, and Raydium."},{"question":"Can you create a stablecoin pegged to USD?","answer":"Yes. We build fiat-collateralized stablecoins (1:1 USD reserve model), crypto-collateralized models (MakerDAO-style), and algorithmic stablecoins. Each requires different compliance and reserve architecture."},{"question":"How long does token development take?","answer":"A standard ERC-20 token with vesting and liquidity contracts takes 2–4 weeks including audit. A full stablecoin or governance token system with DAO integration takes 2–4 months."}]

pages.title: NFT Development Company | NFT Marketplace, Minting Platform & Gaming NFTs | Gemora Tech
pages.metaTitle: NFT Development Company | Marketplace, Minting & Gaming NFTs
pages.metaDescription: Build custom NFT marketplaces, minting platforms, digital collectibles, and gaming NFT ecosystems with Gemora Tech's certified NFT development team.
pages.content:
Custom NFT Development Services

Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs) have unlocked entirely new models for digital ownership, creator monetization, gaming economies, and real-world asset tokenization. Gemora Tech is a full-service NFT development company, building everything from simple minting contracts to sophisticated multi-chain NFT marketplaces with royalty enforcement, auction mechanics, and gaming integrations.

NFT Marketplaces

We build production-ready NFT marketplaces with all essential trading features:

  • Fixed-price listings and English/Dutch auction mechanisms
  • On-chain royalty enforcement (ERC-2981 standard)
  • Creator dashboards for collection management and analytics
  • Lazy minting (gas-free NFT creation, mint on first purchase)
  • Multi-chain support: Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, BNB Chain
  • IPFS/Arweave-based metadata and media storage for permanent availability

NFT Minting Platforms

  • Custom minting site with whitelisting, allowlist, and public sale phases
  • Batch minting for large PFP (profile picture) collections (10,000+ NFTs)
  • Reveal mechanics with pre-reveal placeholder metadata
  • Gas-optimized ERC-721A contracts for mass mint events
  • Fiat-to-NFT purchasing via credit card onramps (Moonpay, Stripe)

Digital Collectibles

  • Generative art collections with on-chain attribute rarity systems
  • Sports memorabilia and celebrity digital collectibles
  • Music and event ticketing NFTs with transfer and resale controls
  • Loyalty program NFTs redeemable for real-world benefits

Gaming NFTs

  • In-game item and character NFTs with on-chain attribute progression
  • Play-to-earn reward mechanics with loot drop smart contracts
  • Cross-game NFT portability and interoperability bridges
  • ERC-1155 multi-token standards for mixed game economies

Related Services

  • Token Development
  • DeFi Development
  • Smart Contract Development
  • Web3 Development
  • Back to Blockchain Overview
pages.faqs: [{"question":"What blockchain should I build my NFT project on?","answer":"Ethereum offers the highest liquidity and collector trust. Polygon and Solana offer low gas fees ideal for gaming and frequent minting. We recommend the best chain based on your audience, budget, and transaction volume."},{"question":"How do NFT royalties work?","answer":"NFT royalties are encoded in the smart contract using the ERC-2981 standard. Every time an NFT is resold on a compliant marketplace, a percentage (e.g., 5–10%) is automatically sent to the original creator's wallet."},{"question":"What is lazy minting?","answer":"Lazy minting allows creators to list NFTs without paying gas fees upfront. The NFT is minted on-chain only when a buyer purchases it, with the buyer covering the minting gas cost."},{"question":"Can you build a gaming NFT with in-game stats that evolve?","answer":"Yes. We build dynamic NFTs whose on-chain metadata (stats, level, attributes) updates based on in-game events through oracle feeds or trusted game servers calling update functions."},{"question":"How long does it take to build an NFT marketplace?","answer":"A basic NFT marketplace takes 6–10 weeks. A full-featured marketplace with auctions, multi-chain support, creator dashboards, and analytics typically takes 3–5 months."}]
